completed: Added crawlable topic hubs for high-intent beats including the Federal Reserve, AIPAC, Israel policy, surveillance, CIA covert power, the Epstein network, and the JFK assassination.
Connected homepage keyword chips, chapter keywords, article topic tags, and search discovery modules to topic hubs to improve internal linking and beat-level entry paths.
Expanded the prerender pipeline to emit static HTML for topic hubs, news articles, chapters, and key evergreen routes, then regenerated the sitemap from content.
Verified that prerendered article metadata, canonical tags, JSON-LD, and sitemap entries remain valid even when descriptions include dollar-denominated figures.
Verification completed with npx tsc --noEmit, npm run build, live topic/article head checks on veritasworldwide.com and Railway, and live sitemap checks.
next_task: Turn the new topic-hub traffic into more subscribers with beat-specific thank-you flows, HubSpot attribution, and Search Console verification, then return to bundle reduction.
next_priorities: Connect Google Search Console and submit the regenerated sitemap.
Build beat-specific post-signup and thank-you flows for topic-hub subscribers.
Connect HubSpot workflows, double opt-in, and lifecycle scoring in the portal.
